data.title: Digestive Care Specialists in Germantown, Md., providing support for federal workers during government shutdown to secure access to digestive health care.
data.description: In Germantown, Maryland, Digestive Care Specialists is providing specialized assistance to federal employees impacted by the recent government shutdown. This initiative aims to guarantee access to digestive health services for those affected.

data.title: Weave will announce Q3 2025 financial results on October 30, 2025. Live webcast at 4:30 pm ET.
data.description: Lehi, Utah – Weave, a prominent customer experience and payments software platform for small and medium-sized healthcare businesses, disclosed that it will unveil its financial outcomes for the third quarter of 2025 post the U.S. market closure on Thursday, October 30, 2025. A live audio webcast led by company management is scheduled for 4:30 p.m. ET to address Weave’s financial performance and deliver a business update. Interested parties can join the live audio webcast through the Weave Inv platform.

data.title: Orvana Minerals Corp reports production and exploration updates for Q4 FY2025 from Orovalle, Spain. TSX:ORV.
data.description: Orvana Minerals Corp. (TSX: ORV) reported updates on production and exploration for the fourth quarter of fiscal year 2025 ending on September 30, 2025, from Orovalle in Spain. The company expressed satisfaction with the progress made in Q4 FY2025. The key figures and achievements during this period were not specifically outlined in the rephrase as details on the highlights were not provided.

data.title: Revolution Medicines receives FDA voucher for RMC-6236 under CNPV pilot program, a targeted therapy for RAS-addicted cancers.
data.description: On October 16, 2025, Revolution Medicines, Inc., based in Redwood City, California, disclosed that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has issued a non-transferrable voucher to the company for daraxonrasib (RMC-6236), their RAS(ON) multi-selective inhibitor. Revolution Medicines is a late-stage clinical oncology firm concentrated on developing targeted therapies for patients with RAS-addicted cancers. The voucher, granted under the Commissioner's National Priority Voucher (CNPV) pilot program, marks a significant milestone for the company, listed as Nasdaq: RVMD.

data.title: Zeta Network, listed on Nasdaq, raises $231M through Bitcoin-backed private placement to bolster balance sheet.
data.description: Zeta's recent private placement, which was funded using Bitcoin or SolvBTC, a token representing Bitcoin in a wrapped form, is seen as a strategic move to bolster its balance sheet. This decision underscores the company's embrace of cryptocurrency as a viable investment option. The use of Bitcoin in this placement highlights the growing trend of businesses diversifying their assets and utilizing digital currencies. The move not only showcases Zeta's confidence in the cryptocurrency market but also indicates a shift towards non-traditional forms of funding. This development reflects the increasing acceptance and adoption of digital assets in the financial sector. Overall, Zeta's decision to utilize Bitcoin and SolvBTC in its private placement demonstrates its commitment to capitalizing on the advantages of digital currencies in improving financial stability and agility.

data.title: Buenaventura reveals Q3 2025 results: El Brocal produced 5,032 oz of gold, Orcopampa 13,314 oz in 3 months.
data.description: In Lima, Peru, Compañía de Minas Buenaventura S.A.A. ("Buenaventura" or "the Company"), the largest publicly-traded precious metals mining company in Peru, has released its 3Q25 production and sales figures. As of September 30, 2025, gold production at El Brocal was at 5,032 ounces, representing a 61.43% increase. For the same period, Orcopampa produced 13,314 ounces, meeting 100% of its production capacity. The total production for the nine months ending on September 30, 2025, reached 15,240 ounces for El Brocal and 39,878 ounces for Orcopampa. The company has updated its guidance for the year, setting the expected production between 20,000 to 22,000 ounces.

data.title: Lundin Mining pre-announced Q3 2025 impact: $11M provisional pricing adjustments, delay of 20,000 tonnes copper shipment, $26M unrealized loss on derivative contracts. Q3 results to be shared on Nov 5, 2025, with conference call on Nov 6, 2025 at 7:00 AM PT / 10:00 AM ET.
data.description: Lundin Mining Corporation has pre-announced certain impacts on its earnings for the third quarter of 2025. Revenue is expected to be positively impacted by unaudited provisional pricing adjustments of approximately $11 million on a pre-tax basis, related to prior period concentrate sales. Additionally, a timing difference in the production and shipment dates of copper concentrate is expected to impact revenue, with approximately 20,000 tonnes delayed due to weather issues. The company is also anticipated to recognize an unaudited unrealized loss of about $26 million pre-tax related to derivative contracts, primarily due to rising gold prices. The Company will release its third quarter 2025 results on November 5, 2025, followed by a webcast and conference call on November 6, 2025 for further details.

data.title: Wytec discusses stock promotional activity on Oct 14-15, 2025 related to its Integrated Public Safety Solution, involving patented technologies. Engaged AresCMG for outreach to investors and potential purchasers.
data.description: In San Antonio, Wytec released two public press releases on October 14th and 15th, 2025. The press releases introduced their Integrated Public Safety Solution (IPSS), which includes patented technologies for in-building cellular, gunshot, and vape detection systems. AresCMG was enlisted to help create these press releases to attract more investors and potential buyers for their technology. This move aimed to capitalize on the information provided in previous press releases by Wytec.

data.title: GeForce NOW offers new perks: 'Borderlands 4' reward, 10 games, 'Pax Dei' released. Stay updated on latest features.
data.description: GeForce NOW has recently launched new member rewards, offering a special in-game bonus for 'Borderlands 4' and introducing 10 additional games to its platform. The latest addition to the gaming library, 'Pax Dei', has also been released. Stay updated on the newest features and enhancements available to users.

data.title: Apollo Silver Corp files technical report for updated MRE for Calico Silver Project in Vancouver on Oct 16, 2025.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on October 16, 2025, Apollo Silver Corp. disclosed the submission of the independent technical report for the revised Mineral Resource Estimate (MRE) of the Calico Silver Project. Trading under TSX.V:APGO, OTCQB:APGOF, Frankfurt:6ZF, the Company shared this positive update.

data.title: South Bow Corp. to announce Q3 2025 results on Nov. 13, 2025, after market close (TSX & NYSE: SOBO).
data.description: On October 16, 2025, South Bow Corp., trading under SOBO on TSX and NYSE, announced that it will disclose its Q3 2025 financial and operational performance post-market closure on November 13, 2025.

data.title: LEGO's Code Break event in San Diego offers gamers a chance to crack codes and win prizes in a giant vault.
data.description: A large LEGO vault has been introduced in San Diego's Gaslamp Quarter, inviting players across the country to solve puzzles, discover secret rewards, and honor the diverse game worlds that shape contemporary gaming. The vault, known as LEGO Code Break, has been launched by The LEGO Group in San Diego on October 16, 2025. This interactive challenge will captivate gaming enthusiasts as they decipher codes to reveal hidden prizes.
